name: get_daily_consumption_measures
description: Retrieve daily electricity consumption measurements for a home within a specified date range for consumption tracking and historical data analysis

end_date.description: End date and time in ISO 8601 format (e.g., 2026-04-01T00:00:00+02:00)

home_id.description: The unique identifier of the home

start_date.description: Start date and time in ISO 8601 format (e.g., 2026-03-01T00:00:00+01:00)
